# Loki Bootstrap — Documentation

Welcome to the documentation for deploying and managing Loki on AWS.

## Guides

- **[Deploying Loki on AWS](Deploying-Loki-on-AWS.md)** — Complete walkthrough from zero to a running instance. Covers account setup, deployment options (CloudFormation / SAM / Terraform), security best practices, budget alerts, and FAQ.
